title: Stytch
excerpt: description: Validate Stytch session tokens in Pages Functions using the Stytch Pages Plugin. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. The Stytch Pages Plugin is a middleware which validates all requests and their `session_token`. yarn add @cloudflare/pages-plugin-stytch
